title: The Unified Process Workflow and Disciplines Over Time
description: A visual representation of the Unified Process (UP) showing its iterative and incremental nature, with the core workflows (disciplines) and how their relative effort changes across the four phases.
relationships: The diagram shows the four sequential phases on the horizontal axis (time) and the level of effort for each discipline on the vertical axis. Effort for Requirements and Analysis is highest in Inception and Elaboration. Implementation and Test effort peaks during Construction. Deployment effort is highest during Transition. Supporting disciplines (e.g., Project Management) remain active throughout all phases but at a consistent level.
